prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为5240→5088→4876→8528→12067名。2021–2023年在4800–5300区间窄幅波动，2024年贵州省首年新高考（物理类）后位次大幅后移至8528名，2025年进一步后移至12067名，近两年累计后移约7191名，反映新高考模式下该校在贵州的录取门槛显著降低。2025年基准位次约12067名；该校在贵州省理科组招生计划：2021年48人→2022年39人→2023年45人→2024年49人→2025年54人→2026年85人。2026年较2025年大幅扩招31人（+57.4%），为近年最大扩幅，显著增加录取名额，预计将推动最低位次进一步后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，综合实力和声誉增强；2024年高考周期内该校声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理被考生投诉，导致投档线暴跌约500名；2025–2026年周期内无明显负面事件。抖音热度总排名第13位（高热），综合热度约387万，以"京城第一食堂"等话题出圈，曝光量大，对报考关注度有正向拉动。历史投档异常方面，2024年投档线暴跌被列为高关注事件，但2025年已基本消化；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程获评A+，植物保护、生物学获评A，共7个A-/A/A+学科，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐；食品科学与工程（A+）受益于社会关注度提升；农学、动物医学等传统优势专业热度平稳。贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（约297258人）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；中国农业大学位于北京市，在贵州省属跨省招生。该校在贵州招生占比相对稳定，2025年物理类计划54人、历史类13人，2026年物理类大幅扩至85人，显示该校对贵州生源的重视程度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年新高考后位次持续后移的趋势、2026年大幅扩招57.4%的供给冲击、学校软科排名稳步上升的声誉改善、以及抖音高热度的曝光效应，扩招带来的录取名额增加是主导因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年12067名基础上进一步后移。预测最低位次约16274名，区间15774–16774名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 5240 → 5088 → 4876 → 8528 → 12067 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 4800 and 5300. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao (Physics Category) in Guizhou, the ranking significantly dropped to 8528, and further dropped to 12067 in 2025, with a cumulative drop of about 7191 over the past two years, reflecting a significant decrease in admission thresholds for this university in Guizhou under the new Gaokao model. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12067. The enrollment plan for the science group in Guizhou: 2021: 48 → 2022: 39 → 2023: 45 → 2024: 49 → 2025: 54 → 2026: 85. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a substantial expansion of 31 students (+57.4%), the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission slots, which is expected to further push the minimum ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Shanghai Ranking's Chinese university rankings have been steadily rising: 2021: 30th → 2022: 29th → 2023: 30th → 2024: 27th → 2025: 25th → 2026: 24th, with a steady improvement in ranking, comprehensive strength, and reputation. During the 2024 Gaokao cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative', mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, leading to complaints from candidates and a sharp drop in admission scores by about 500 places. In the 2025–2026 cycle, there were no significant negative incidents. On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 13th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 3.87 million. Topics such as 'Beijing's No. 1 Canteen' have gone viral, generating high exposure and positively influencing application interest. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the sharp drop in admission scores in 2024 was listed as a high-concern event, but it has been largely absorbed by 2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering were rated A+, while Plant Protection and Biology were rated A, totaling 7 A-/A/A+ disciplines. The university's agricultural and forestry disciplines are top-tier nationally, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. Food Science and Engineering (A+) benefits from increased social attention. Traditional advantageous majors like Agronomy and Veterinary Medicine have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,258), leading to slightly intensified competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing and recruits across provinces in Guizhou. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is relatively stable, with 54 Physics Category and 13 History Category slots in 2025, and a significant expansion to 85 Physics Category slots in 2026, indicating an increased emphasis on Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in rankings after the new Gaokao in 2024–2025, the supply shock of a 57.4% expansion in 2026, the improvement in reputation due to steadily rising Shanghai Rankings, and the exposure effect of high Douyin popularity, the increase in admission slots due to expansion is the dominant factor. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further drop from the 2025 baseline of 12067. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16274, with a range of 15774–16774.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a 57.4% expansion in 2026, the ranking is expected to drop to approximately 16274 (range 15774–16774). Candidates within this ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Agronomy, Veterinary Medicine, Food Science, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Science Experimental Classes and Computer/Electronic Information as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<15774) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors and experimental classes.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 该校在贵州省文科组仅2025年有录取数据（历史类），最低位次约1935名。2021–2024年无文科/历史类招生记录，缺乏历史走势参考；文科组招生计划：2025年（历史类）13人，2026年13人，计划持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名2026年第24名，近年持续上升，综合声誉增强；2024年高考周期内该校声誉评价为"明显负面"（招生沟通问题），但2025–2026年无明显负面事件；抖音热度总排名第13位（高热），以食堂等话题获得大量曝光，对报考关注度有正向拉动；文科组招生专业主要为经济学类、法学、农村区域发展、公共事业管理、电子商务、市场营销，与该校A+学科（作物学、兽医学等）关联度较低；但经济学类可映射至应用经济学（未单独评级），法学未单独评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热但分化观望；经济学/金融类分化观望；公共管理、市场营销等热度一般。贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；中国农业大学位于北京市，跨省招生。文科组计划稳定（13人），其中部分专业（市场营销、电子商务、公共事业管理）为烟台研究院培养模式，可能影响考生报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 文科组计划持平，但学校软科排名持续上升、抖音高热曝光可能吸引更多考生关注，加之贵州省考生总数略有增加，预计竞争小幅加剧，最低位次在2025年1935名基础上略前移。预测最低位次约1905名，区间1619–2191名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The university's liberal arts group in Guizhou Province only has admission data for 2025 (History Category), with the lowest ranking approximately 1935. From 2021 to 2024, there were no liberal arts/history category admission records, lacking historical trend reference; liberal arts group enrollment plan: 13 students in 2025 (History Category), 13 students in 2026, the plan remains stable, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 24th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing overall reputation; during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was "significantly negative" (admission communication issues), but there were no obvious negative events in 2025-2026; Douyin popularity total ranking 13th (high heat), gaining significant exposure through topics such as canteens, positively influencing application attention; the liberal arts group's major offerings mainly include Economics, Law, Rural Regional Development, Public Administration, E-commerce, and Marketing, which have low correlation with the university's A+ disciplines (Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, etc.); however, Economics can be mapped to Applied Economics (not separately rated), and Law is not separately rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity but with divided and wait-and-see attitudes; Economics/Finance are divided and wait-and-see; Public Administration, Marketing, etc. have average popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, with cross-province enrollment. The liberal arts group plan is stable (13 students), with some majors (Marketing, E-commerce, Public Administration) adopting the Yantai Research Institute training model, which may affect candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The liberal arts group plan remains stable, but the university's continuous rise in Soft Science rankings and high Douyin heat exposure may attract more candidates' attention. Coupled with a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province, competition is expected to intensify slightly, with the lowest ranking moving slightly forward from the 2025 ranking of 1935. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 1905, with a range of 1619-2191.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group has few majors (only 6) and a stable plan (13 students). The predicted ranking is approximately 1905 (range 1619-2191). It is recommended that candidates within the ranking range focus on Tier 2 Public Administration as the main target, use Tier 1 Law and Economics as reach options, and Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute majors as safety choices. Note that Marketing, E-commerce, and Public Administration adopt the Yantai Research Institute training model (one year in Beijing + three years in Yantai); candidates should confirm the training arrangements before applying.
